_comment: Preview for Phase 2 (Task 2D.11) — Cartesian vector potential A with three constant amplitudes (V_Ax, V_Ay, V_Az) sharing the Phase-1 Gaussian-modulated profile. FH params pinned at the Session-11 canonical anchor. V_A* axes scan three values each: 0 (irrotational baseline), 0.05 (perturbative), 0.20 (mid). Profile params pinned at the Phase-1 best-coverage choices (sigma_A=2.5, r_A=6.0, ell_A=2.5). 3^3 = 27 raw points; should run in ~5-10 s locally. Bit-exact regression: V_Ax=V_Ay=V_Az=0 must reproduce the irrotational baseline (dec_slack_min = -7.74e-2).
